Moeun Sokhuch — Runtah Chaoeng Dang Tonle Sab (the thunderous kick of Tonle Sab)

Moeun Sokhuch is a 29-year-old fighter representing Mesor Thngok Svay Rieng.

  • Total Fights: 139
